title: Prepare and manage organic or biodynamic certification
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and manage organic or biodynamic certification demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Investigate and access information sources and support for conversion to organic or biodynamic production

pcs.text: Establish contact with organic producers and marketers of organic products

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish contact with organic producers and marketers of organic products.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select accrediting body according to organic farm production system.
